alerts.title: Granola raises $125M, hits $1.5B valuation as it expands from meeting notetaker to enterprise AI app
alerts.description: Granola's valuation jumped from $250 million to $1.5 billion with this round, and it has added more support for AI agents after users previously complained.

alerts.title: Mercor competitor Deccan AI raises $25M, sources experts from India
alerts.description: Deccan AI concentrates its workforce in India to manage quality in a fast-growing but fragmented AI training market.

alerts.title: Harvey confirms $11B valuation: Sequoia triples down
alerts.description: Investors like Sequoia, Andreessen Horowitz,  Kleiner Perkins, and Elad Gil can't get enough of AI legal tech startup Harvey.

alerts.title: Lucid Bots raises $20M to keep up with demand for its window-washing drones
alerts.description: Lucid Bots has seen demand accelerate over the last year for its window-cleaning drones and power-washing robots.

alerts.title: Tencent to Double AI Spending to More Than $5B Over Next Year
alerts.description: The vendor is getting into the fast-growing AI personal agent market.

alerts.title: French AI Startup Building World Models Raises $1.03 billion
alerts.description: World models are gaining popularity quickly as developers seek new ways to train generative AI models.
